sentences.target: Ta tenue est parfaite pour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ta təny ɛ paʁfɛt puʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Ta tenue est parfaite pour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ta təny ɛ paʁfɛt puʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Your outfit is perfect for tonight.
translations.es: Tu atuendo es perfecto para esta noche.
translations.de: Dein Outfit ist perfekt für heute Abend.
translations.it: Il tuo outfit è perfetto per stasera.
translations.yue: 你今晚嘅打扮非常完美。
translations.ru: Твой наряд идеален для сегодняшнего вечера.
translations.pt: Sua roupa está perfeita para hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Trang phục của bạn hoàn hảo cho tối nay.
translations.nl: Je outfit is perfect voor vanavond.
translations.uk: Твій наряд ідеальний для сьогоднішнього вечора.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा पहनावा आज रात के लिए बिल्कुल सही है।
translations.pl: Twój strój jest idealny na dziś wieczór.
translations.el: Η εμφάνισή σου είναι τέλεια για απόψε.
translations.nb: Antrekket ditt er perfekt for i kveld.
translations.sv: Din outfit är perfekt för ikväll.
translations.ro: Ținuta ta este perfectă pentru diseară.
translations.cs: Tvůj outfit je perfektní na dnešní večer.
translations.da: Dit outfit er perfekt til i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜の服装は完璧です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular informal; feminine singular to agree with 'tenue'. Modifies the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, feminine singular; predicate complement agreeing with 'tenue'.
Preposition introducing a complement of purpose/time.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour' (time adjunct: 'ce soir' = tonight).

sentences.target: Votre tenue doit être plus formelle ici.
sentences.reading: /vɔtʁ təny dwa ɛtʁ ply fɔʁmɛl isi/

translations.fr: Votre tenue doit être plus formelle ici.
translations.ipa: /vɔtʁ təny dwa ɛtʁ ply fɔʁmɛl isi/
translations.en: Your outfit needs to be more formal here.
translations.es: Su vestimenta debe ser más formal aquí.
translations.de: Ihre Kleidung muss hier formeller sein.
translations.it: Il suo abbigliamento qui deve essere più formale.
translations.ko: 여기서는 복장이 더 격식 있어야 합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 在这里您的穿着需要更正式一些。
translations.yue: 喺呢度你嘅著裝要正式啲。
translations.ru: Здесь ваша одежда должна быть более формальной.
translations.pt: Aqui, sua roupa precisa ser mais formal.
translations.he: כאן הלבוש שלך צריך להיות יותר רשמי.
translations.vi: Ở đây, trang phục của bạn cần trang trọng hơn.
translations.ar: هنا يجب أن تكون ملابسك أكثر رسمية.
translations.nl: Hier moet je outfit formeler sein.
translations.uk: Тут ваш одяг має бути більш офіційним.
translations.hu: Itt az öltözékednek formálisabbnak kell lennie.
translations.hi: यहाँ आपका पहनावा अधिक औपचारिक होना चाहिए।
translations.pl: Tutaj twój strój musi być bardziej formalny.
translations.el: Εδώ το ντύσιμό σας πρέπει να είναι πιο επίσημο.
translations.nb: Her må antrekket ditt være mer formelt.
translations.id: Di sini, pakaianmu harus lebih formal.
translations.sv: Här måste din outfit vara mer formell.
translations.ro: Aici, ținuta ta trebuie să fie mai formală.
translations.cs: Tady musí být váš oděv formálnější.
translations.da: Her skal dit outfit være mere formelt.
translations.ja: ここでは服装をもっとフォーマルにする必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 2nd person plural/formal; agrees in gender/number with 'tenue' (fem. sg.).
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; expresses obligation and selects an infinitive complement.
Infinitive copula; links the subject to the following adjectival predicate under the modal 'doit'.
Adverb of degree marking comparative intensity before an adjective.
Adjective, feminine singular; predicative complement via the copula, agreeing with 'tenue'.
Adverb of place; situational adjunct specifying location.

sentences.target: On cherche une tenue pour l'entretien.

translations.fr: On cherche une tenue pour l'entretien.
translations.en: We are looking for an outfit for the interview.
translations.es: Buscamos un atuendo para la entrevista.
translations.de: Wir suchen ein Outfit für das Vorstellungsgespräch.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un outfit per il colloquio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一套面试用的服装。
translations.yue: 我哋喺搵一套面試用嘅服裝。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma roupa para a entrevista.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một trang phục cho buổi phỏng vấn.
translations.nl: We zoeken een outfit voor het sollicitatiegesprek.
translations.hi: हम साक्षात्कार के लिए एक पहनावा ढूँढ़ रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε ένα ντύσιμο για τη συνέντευξη.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et antrekk til intervjuet.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari pakaian untuk wawancara.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en outfit till intervjun.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et outfit til samtalen.
translations.ja: 面接用の服を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal pronoun used colloquially for 'we'; grammatical 3rd person singular; subject.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; transitive.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'tenue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/target complement.
Noun with elided definite article (l' = le before vowel); object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Je lave ma tenue pour demain.

translations.fr: Je lave ma tenue pour demain.
translations.en: I'm washing my outfit for tomorrow.
translations.es: Estoy lavando mi ropa para mañana.
translations.de: Ich wasche meine Kleidung für morgen.
translations.it: Sto lavando i miei vestiti per domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在洗明天要穿的衣服。
translations.pt: Estou lavando minha roupa para amanhã.
translations.he: אני מכבס את הבגדים שלי למחר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giặt đồ để mặc ngày mai.
translations.nl: Ik was mijn kleding voor morgen.
translations.hi: मैं कल के लिए अपने कपड़े धो रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πλένω τα ρούχα μου για αύριο.
translations.nb: Jeg vasker klærne mine til i morgen.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencuci pakaian untuk besok.
translations.sv: Jag tvättar mina kläder för imorgon.
translations.da: Jeg vasker mit tøj til i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日着る服を洗っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; feminine singular agreeing with 'tenue'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'lave'.
Preposition introducing a time-related purpose.
Temporal adverb; adjunct indicating time.
